title: 'A reveal later this year has been planned' — Hold on to your sabers fellow Star Wars fans, a new report claims Knights of the Old Republic remake will finally be re-revealed soon
summary: Get full access to premium articles, exclusive features and a growing list of member rewards. That's according to reliable Star Wars insider and YouTuber 100% Star Wars (via Bespin Bulletin ), who addressed reports that the KOTOR remake could launch in 2028.
